nodes.name: Usambara thrush
nodes.summary: Usambara thrush（Usambara thrush，学名 Turdus roehli），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于安东·赖歇诺。

nodes.name: 安东·赖歇诺
nodes.summary: 安东·赖歇诺是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联27种鸟类，包括索马里鸵鸟、Striped flufftail、烏干達點啄木等27种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Usambara thrush (Turdus roehli), also known as Roehl's thrush or Usambara olive thrush, is a species of thrush found in eastern Africa. Formerly, it was considered as a subspecies of the olive thrush, with which it is known to hybridize with, but is now recognised as a separate species
